text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Uh... How do I put this? Well... uh...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
If you've got something to say, then hurry up and
say it! You've been like this all day!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Shut it! You wouldn't get it. I gotta prepare
myself—there's a timing to this kinda stuff!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! I have no idea what you're talking about! If
you've got nothing to say, then quit following me.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm only followin' you 'cause I got something to
tell you!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat?! Then drop the cutesy act and speak up,
would you?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
If a fight's what you're looking for, then fine! Go
ahead, lay it aaaall out!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Huuuh?! You dare say th—wait, what did you say?
Happy... birthday? Huh?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: There! I've said my piece, so I'm out!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...Hmph. What was all that about? It wouldn't hurt
for you to be a little more straightforward, you
know?
